runbook.name: Riverbed IQ Assist for ServiceNow - Incident - Caller Endpoint Diagnostic - 3.1
runbook.description: Triggered in the context of an Incident in ServiceNow, the runbook find the user endpoint of the caller, diagnose, and enriches the incident record with an Insight.

nodes.label: Riverbed IQ Assist invoked in ServiceNow Incident

properties.comment:
Prerequisites

* Riverbed IQ Assist app must be installed and configured in ServiceNow.

* ServiceNow integration must be installed and configured with a connector in Riverbed IQ.

* The GenAI feature must be enabled.


Setup

This runbook can be installed in Riverbed IQ as follows:

  1. Import this runbook file from the External Runbooks page. Make sure to select connectors in the import dialog.
  2. Enable Allow Automation on the imported runbook in the External Runbooks page. 
  3. Create automation rule to link a webhook call to this runbook.
  4. Make sure ServiceNow app is configured with the appropriate webhook URL.

Riverbed IQ Assist for ServiceNow

Runbook for Incident in ServiceNow: Caller Endpoint Diagnostic

version: 2026-03

properties.template:
ServiceNow Incident Number: {{variables["runtime.ServiceNow_Incident_Number"]}}

Suggested User Endpoint: {{variables["runtime.User_Endpoint_Name"]}}

nodes.label: ServiceNow: Post Comment
nodes.description:
Add a comment or work notes to a ServiceNow incident or problem.
If it fails to be added, an error message will be returned.

properties.comment:
Payload example

{
"recordType" : "incident",
"recordID" : "e51dccec878c",
"recordNumber" : "INC0013262"
}

in.outer: User Endpoint not found for this Caller. Please check the caller.

properties.title: Error message
properties.notes: User Endpoint not found for this Caller. Please check the caller.

nodes.label: Fetch User Endpoint (Aternity EUEM)
nodes.description: This subflow takes one or more device names as a comma separated list and outputs User Device objects.

nodes.label: ServiceNow: Get Incident Details
nodes.description: Returns details of a ServiceNow incident given a sys ID or an incident number.

nodes.label: Skill: Run User Endpoint Diagnosis
nodes.description: Diagnose user endpoint based on health events and metrics such as CPU/memory, I/O and Wi-Fi.

nodes.label: Skill: Find Recent User Endpoints
nodes.description: Returns user endpoints that have been recently used by an end user based on the username, display name or email address.

nodes.label: Skill: Generate Insight
nodes.description: Generate an HTML formatted insight with charts.
